name: EverMe Memory Plugin
description: Real-time memory retrieval and persistence backed by the EverMe cloud (cold-start memory uploaded by evercli)

apiBase.description: EverMe API base URL. Defaults to env EVERME_API_BASE.

agentId.description: EverMe agentId (agt_...). Defaults to env EVERME_AGENT_ID. Written by `evercli plugin install`.

agentToken.description: EverMe agentToken (evt_...). Defaults to env EVERME_AGENT_TOKEN. NEVER log or echo.

topK.description: Maximum memory rows to retrieve per turn

flushEveryTurns.description: How many turns between auto-flush calls. 1 (default) = flush every turn so short sessions still produce agent_case/agent_skill. Larger values trade extraction freshness for fewer upstream LLM extract calls but lose extraction entirely on sessions that never reach the threshold. Set both flushEveryTurns and flushMaxBytes to 0 to disable runtime writes.

flushMaxBytes.description: Legacy switch. Set both flushEveryTurns and flushMaxBytes to 0 to disable runtime writes; realtime writes do not buffer by byte size.
